name: Doodle Race
author: Poki
description: Doodle Race is a racing adventure where you get to design your own car before hitting the track! Draw your car and wheels, add cool colors and stickers, then race through wild worlds packed with jumps, obstacles, and coins. It's your doodle, your ride, your race. Can you outdrive the competition? How to play Doodle Race? Jump: W or the up arrow key Move: A/D or left and right arrow keys Draw: use your mouse to draw Who created Doodle Race? Doodle Race is created by FM Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Detective Lawrence , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 2 , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 3 , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4 , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 5 , Forgotten Hill Memento: Playground , Forgotten Hill Memento: Love Beyond , Forgotten Hill Memento: Buried Things , Forgotten Hill: Puppeteer , Forgotten Hill: Fall , Forgotten Hill: Surgery , Little Cabin in the Woods and Pixel Volley ! How can I play Doodle Race for free? You can play Doodle Race for free on Poki. Can I play Doodle Race on mobile devices and desktop? Doodle Race can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
